revision.comment: New code to centralize all similar templates
style="vertical-align: top;" isn't needed, add Usage
revision.text:
{| class="infobox" style="width: 20em; font-size: 90%;" |+ style="font-size:larger;" | '''{{{name}}}''' |- class="hiddenStructure{{{image|}}}" | colspan="2" style="text-align: center;" | [[Image:{{{image}}}|250px| ]]
{{{caption|}}} |- style="vertical-align: top;" ! Born | {{{birth_date}}}
{{{birth_place|}}} |- class="hiddenStructure{{{death_date|}}}" ! Died | {{{death_date}}}
{{{death_place|}}} |- class="hiddenStructure{{{title|}}}" ! Title | {{{title}}} |- class="hiddenStructure{{{salary|}}}" ! Salary | {{{salary}}} |- class="hiddenStructure{{{term|}}}" ! Term | {{{term}}} |- class="hiddenStructure{{{predecessor|}}}" ! Predecessor | {{{predecessor}}} |- class="hiddenStructure{{{successor|}}}" ! Successor | {{{successor}}} |- class="hiddenStructure{{{party|}}}" ! Political party | {{{party}}} |- class="hiddenStructure{{{religion|}}}" ! Religion | {{{religion}}} |- class="hiddenStructure{{{spouse|}}}" ! Spouse | {{{spouse}}} |- class="hiddenStructure{{{children|}}}" ! Children | {{{children}}} |- class="hiddenStructure{{{website|}}}" | '''Website:''' {{{website}}} |- class="hiddenStructure{{{footnotes|}}}" | colspan="2" | {{{footnotes}}} |} == Usage == 
{{Infobox_Person | name =
| image =
| caption =
| birth_date =
| birth_place =
| title =
| salary =
| term =
| predecessor = 
| successor = 
| party = 
| religion = 
| spouse = 
| children = 
| website
| footnotes
}}

revision.text:
{| class="infobox" style="width: 20em; font-size: 90%;" |+ style="font-size:larger;" | '''{{{name}}}'''{{#if:{{{other_names|}}}|
{{{other_names|}}}}} |- {{#if: {{{image|}}}| {{!}} colspan="2" style="text-align: center;" {{!}} [[Image:{{{image|}}}|225px| ]]
{{{caption|}}}}} |- style="vertical-align: top;" ! Born | {{{birth_date}}} {{#if:{{{birth_place|}}}|
{{{birth_place|}}}}} |- {{#if: {{{death_date|}}}| ! Died {{!}} {{{death_date|}}} {{#if:{{{death_place|}}}|
{{{death_place}}}}}{{#if:{{{death_cause|}}}|
{{{death_cause|}}}}}}} |- {{#if: {{{known|}}}| ! Known for {{!}} {{{known|}}}}} |- {{#if: {{{occupation|}}}| ! Occupation {{!}} {{{occupation|}}}}} |- {{#if: {{{title|}}}| ! Title {{!}} {{{title|}}}}} |- {{#if: {{{salary|}}}| ! Salary {{!}} {{{salary|}}}}} |- {{#if: {{{term|}}}| ! Term {{!}} {{{term|}}}}} |- {{#if: {{{predecessor|}}}| ! Predecessor {{!}} {{{predecessor|}}}}} |- {{#if: {{{successor|}}}| ! Successor {{!}} {{{successor|}}}}} |- {{#if: {{{party|}}}| ! Political party {{!}} {{{party|}}}}} |- {{#if: {{{boards|}}}| ! Boards on {{!}} {{{boards|}}}}} |- {{#if: {{{religion|}}}| ! Religion {{!}} {{{religion|}}}}} |- {{#if: {{{spouse|}}}| ! Spouse {{!}} {{{spouse|}}}}} |- {{#if: {{{children|}}}| ! Children {{!}} {{{children|}}}}} |- {{#if: {{{relatives|}}}| ! Notable relatives {{!}} {{{relatives|}}}}} |- {{#if: {{{website|}}}| {{!}} '''Website:''' {{{website|}}}}} |- colspan="2" {{#if: {{{footnotes|}}}| {{!}} {{{footnotes|}}}}} |} == Usage ==

| other_names =
| image =
| caption =
| birth_date =
| birth_place =
| death_date =
| death_place =
| death_cause
| known =

revision.comment: Name defaults to pagename if omitted. Birth_date now optional. Add networth, the only parameter from Infobox Celebrity that isn't already here. Show infobox on this page with all parameters displayed.

allow birthplace & deathplace/deathcause to display properly if birthdate or deathdate parameters are omitted (trailing
doesn't display if no text after it, but leading
does display)
Add signature parameter, as found at Infobox Writer, Officeholder, Philosopher, etc.
temp change to locate templates using certain parameters
Removed temp changes from prior edit. Added alternate parameter names: known_for = known & relatives = relations.
Add "education", the only parameter from Infobox Biography that isn't already here. Add alternate parameter names from Biography: subject_name=name, image_name=image, date_of_birth=birth_date, etc.
imagesize defaults to 225px if parameter is omitted, fix it so also defaults to 225px if blank ("imagesize= ").
use lower case for recently added parameter name
move Nationality back to original location (duplicate was the one near bottom); move Residence up one line so it occupies same position for living as Resting Place does for dead; trim trailing spaces
replace separate headers for "Resting Place" and its coordinates with multi-line format similar to birth and death sections; see [[Template talk:Infobox Person#Resting place]]
general cleaning up; wrap with includeonly

revision.comment: de-cruft. all this extra code isn't worth it when the doc page is where the template should be shown and not the main template page
.per transcluded documentation and talk page request
Changed protection level for "[[Template:Infobox Person]]": High-risk template on a significant number of BLPs [edit=sysop:move=sysop]
changing protection to full - high risk template
burial -> resting per talk - former label was inaccurate - this parameter is not just used for burials (hence why it is RESTING_place)
move {{{title}}} param so it displays above {{{term}}} per talk page
Add [[microformat]] capability per edit request on talk
alt params per request by Eubulides
undoing microformat, per request on talk page
minor - no really, very very minor indeed.
moved [[Template:Infobox Person]] to [[Template:Infobox person]]: per talk request
+[[Category:Articles with hCards]] per EP request on talk page
Renumber in preparation for merger of new fields per editrequest on talk page (two step edit to make diffs easier to follow)
per edit request on talk page
Additional classes + renumber in preparation for potential additional field
Various fixes: (1) Add denomination, (2) allow space or underscore in field names for consistency, (3) fix br tags in multicomponent lists (born, died)
set default width of images to 225px per discussion
"location" is very broad to refer only to birth place. please don't make edit in a heavily transcluded template that fast
redoing until we find(?) a better solution
Updating to sandbox as per editrequest
add additional parameters for missing people per [[Template_talk:Infobox_person&redirect=no#Additional_parameters_for_missing_people|discussion]] and remove a tracking category
only use tracking cats on ns:0
add row for native name per discussion, renumber other rows
trying to get website on the same line
Added tracking category. I ll remove shortly
show signature with the same way all other infoboxes do
show signature with the same way all other infoboxes do
show signature with the same way all other infoboxes do
Signature per discussion in Talk page
one tracking less. Only 1 article uses signature_size
add tracking for salary/networth when dead
Revert recent addition per objections on talk page, discuss here first please. Thank you!

Undid revision 446578984 by [[Special:Contributions/Plastikspork|Plastikspork]] ([[User talk:Plastikspork|talk]]) - this removes support from articles, but you haven't edited the articles to compensate
Undid revision 446579631 by [[Special:Contributions/Kwamikagami|Kwamikagami]] ([[User talk:Kwamikagami|talk]]) - rm undiscussed controversial addition, per talk
add birthplace & deathplace classes as per request
notable works -> notable work(s) per infobox writer
use template to had placeholder images rather than lots of #ifs
use #invoke:InfoboxImage for signature. See [[Module:InfoboxImage]] for details.
add honours param from sandbox as per edit request
add tracking category [[Category:Infobox person using influence]]
Undid revision 564175603 by [[Special:Contributions/Kww|Kww]] ([[User talk:Kww|talk]])a dispute has arisen as to the quality of the consensus for this change
Undid revision 564242560 by [[Special:Contributions/Kww|Kww]] ([[User talk:Kww|talk]])consensus on talk page is clearly to remove these parameters
copy from sandbox, per request at [[Template talk:Infobox person#Baptism]]
Changed protection level of Template:Infobox person: allow template editors to modify ([Edit=Protected template] (indefinite) [Move=Protected template] (indefinite))
as requested, feel free to revert if this is controversial
add Check ISO 639-1 validator; remove deprecated xml:lang
undo - [[Template:Check ISO 639-1]] has caused problems in both [[Template:Infobox settlement]] and [[Template:Infobox officeholder]], so removing all transclusions for now
per edit request on talk page
fix when name is blank (e.g., top of [[template:infobox model]])
Nominated for merging with [[Template:Infobox artist]]; see [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2014 June 14#Template:Infobox artist]]. ([[WP:TW|TW]])
Undid revision 614281632 by [[Special:Contributions/Sardanaphalus|Sardanaphalus]] ([[User talk:Sardanaphalus|talk]]) Best not to pollute data fields with labels.
Undid revision 614293693 by [[Special:Contributions/Sardanaphalus|Sardanaphalus]] ([[User talk:Sardanaphalus|talk]]) this is not a sandbox
Undid revision 614293763 by [[Special:Contributions/Frietjes|Frietjes]] ([[User talk:Frietjes|talk]]) You are correct. Have you looked at this template's sandbox and testcases pages recently?
Move signature below modules per [[Template_talk:Infobox_person#Signature_below_modules|thread on talk page]], and revert undiscussed change to website parameter
per edit request on talk page
match logic used by label and data (strange behaviour when first is blank), and remove additional lang which is set by the backend software
track pages that have no image but have an image on Wikidata, per request of [[User:Taketa]]
to address complaints of grammatical inaccuracy when only one parent is notable
Undid revision 650030478 by [[Special:Contributions/DePiep|DePiep]] ([[User talk:DePiep|talk]]) Unnecessarily over-complex; no consensus for this in recent talk page discussion
Undid revision 650685879 by [[Special:Contributions/Illegitimate Barrister|Illegitimate Barrister]] ([[User talk:Illegitimate Barrister|talk]]) See talk
Wrap in #if so we can track actual uses
Better for finding the actual uses of the new subtemplates
replace {{PAGENAME}} with {{PAGENAMEBASE}} to remove any disambiguation from infobox title, edited using [[Project:AWB|AWB]]
Add pronunciation, rm styling hacks, regular label for website, signature on a new line
moving back, thread started on talk page
Undid revision 670439382 by [[Special:Contributions/Alakzi|Alakzi]] ([[User talk:Alakzi|talk]]) lol, try waiting at least 24 hours
Three days without substantive objections, restoring
above to title (will post on talk)
upgrade label/data33 to allow |works parameter to display "Works" label - see [[:Template talk:Infobox person #Works parameter]]
allow 'burial place' as an alternative label to 'resting place'; use 'burial_coordinates' as companion - see [[Template talk:Infobox person #Resting place parameter]]
add more exhaustive tracking with [[Category:Articles using infobox person with unsupported parameters]]
update template per talk [[Template talk:Infobox #Denomination placement]] and [[Template talk:Infobox person #Template-protected edit request on 18 February 2016]]
add father and mother aliases per [[Template_talk:Infobox_person#Template-protected_edit_request_on_25_February_2016|edit request]]

use {{ubl}} instead of
, detect if {{{parents}}} is used
display (mother) and (father), as is recommended for "relatives" field
alphabetize supported parameter list to make it easier to determine if all of the supported parameters are listed
disable missing image check if this box is embedded in another box since the primary box should be the one checking for missing images ...
update to include alternative spelling 'Organisation' for label in en-gb articles, per [[Template talk:Infobox person #Organisation parameter]]
disable ethnicity parameter per [[Wikipedia:Village pump (policy)/Archive 127 #RfC: Ethnicity in infoboxes]]
remove religion from the list of accepted parameters
add tracking for ethnicity and religion
warning message for imminent removal of religion parameter - put religion back into list of known parameters for now
just warn when religion parameter is used in the infobox
tracking denomination parameter prior to its removal
renaming unknown param category for uniformity.
disabling religion and denomination per [[Wikipedia:Village pump (policy)/Archive 126#RfC: Religion in biographical infoboxes]] -- disable advance warning message
add an optional parameter to prevent {{Wikidata image}} from adding an article to [[Category:No local image but image on Wikidata]], tested with /sandbox and [[Haider Ackermann]] article

Add tracking category for infoboxes with an image that can be imported to Wikidata per [[Template_talk:Infobox_person#Template-protected_edit_request_on_23_March_2017|edit request]]. Tested in sandbox on [[Bhante Vimalaramsi]] and [[Ndaté Yalla Mbodj]].
rmv merge; it's the other way round
adding label_name parameter per merger with [[Template:Infobox fashion designer]]
forgot to add param to cat checking
support parameter alias variant used in {{infobox officeholder}}, etc., for easier conversion/merging
Undid revision 800559282 - There are cases where a blank name parameter is passed over, so the code needs to be this way to still show the name in those cases
Merging in the font-weight:normal from [[Template:Infobox officeholder]]; people are already complaining about the bold.
Reducing prefix/suffix size per [[Template talk:Infobox person]] feedback. The 77% has been calculated to be the minimum size in this context that will comply with [[MOS:ACCESSIBILITY]].
Unlinking circular redirects: [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2017 September 13#Template:Infobox_adult_biography]] closed as redirect ([[WP:XFDC|XFDcloser]])
Undid revision 801897769 by [[Special:Contributions/Primefac|Primefac]] ([[User talk:Primefac|talk]]) weird XFDcloser glitch
add |office parameter per discussion at [[Template talk:Infobox person #Title/position]]
prevent a common "error" that's actually normal English

code cleanup; support alt. parameter names found in various templates, incl. url, post-nominals, and pre-nominals; removed dead code; fixed legit parameters missing from checklist - sandboxed, working fine
Fix blank logic per talk page
I think we may need these
Adding spouses, spouse(s), partners, partner(s), to account for confusing and incorrect documentation of these parameter names. I'm working on a /doc overhaul; almost done with it.
Add "Baptized" as alternative to "Baptised" per [[Template_talk:Infobox_person#Baptized_(vs_baptised)|edit request]]
Undid revision 835902245 by [[Special:Contributions/RexxS|RexxS]] ([[User talk:RexxS|talk]]) i can't quite figure out why, but this has broken signature display, see testcases and [[Bill Gates]]
add tracking category for alma mater - see talk - Use of "Alma mater"
Change span class=xxx to div to fix [[Special:LintErrors|Linter]] div-span-flip error. Tested in sandbox with a few dozen articles; notify me on Template talk page if there are any display problems.
allow for landscape images (partial merger with [[Template:Infobox Chinese-language singer and actor]] using image options from [[Template:Infobox musical artist]])

we stopped using title-case parameters in infoboxes a long time ago - I'll remove the others after checking [[:Category:Pages using infobox person with unknown parameters]]; add 'landscape' to parameters checked for
remove Img_size - 3 aliases is more than enough. No current cases in use - checked at [[:Category:Pages using infobox person with unknown parameters]]
rm category as result of [[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/2019 April 7 #Category:Pages to import images to Wikidata]]
add {{{embed|}}} as an alias for child, per edit request
add tracking category for 'residence parameter' while RfC is ongoing
rm weight parameters, per talk page discussion. In case this is controversial, I did not renumber the labels.
Implement native_name below name, per long talk page discussion
commenting out residence parameter and removing it as a valid parameter in the check
add support for criminal_charges= and (s) to label
added [[siglum]] parameter for people who use a specific shortcut to (publicly) sign their work (often formed of name initials, but not always)
Added tracking category to track deprecated weight parameters
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contribs/Pkbwcgs|Pkbwcgs]] ([[User talk:Pkbwcgs|talk]]) to last version by Matthiaspaul
rm hyphen in "Call-sign" per article title at [[Call sign]]

revision.comment: home town parameter removed per consensus
categorise deprecated params separately, so not clogging up main cat with 17k pages of all kinds of stuff
adding [[Category:Pages using infobox person with conflicting parameters]] per talk page
add tracking cat for deprecated "home town" parameter
Limit depr parameter check to article space
Undid revision 1005189556 by [[Special:Contributions/IceWelder|IceWelder]] ([[User talk:IceWelder|talk]]) rv test
rm tracking for empty categories; new usages will show up in the general unknown parameters category
rm tracking categories for box_width, home_town
ensure 125% above-scaling on mobile; no effect on desktop; abovestyle preserved

rm deprecated parameter check; all instances have been eliminated, and the parameter has not been supported for a long time. See [[Wikipedia:Categories_for_discussion/Log/2021_April_18#Category:Infobox_person_using_boxwidth/influence/ethnicity/religion/denomination/home_town_parameter|CFD]].
set up tracking category for deprecated parameter following [[Special:PermaLink/1034222343#Deprecating_the_net_worth_parameter?|this discussion]]
net worth deprecated (see previous edit), removing label/data pair until the usage can be fully removed
gnome request to add tracking category for unknown *empty* parameters
per edit request on talk page - include otherparty parameter as in [[:Template:Infobox officeholder]]
allow use of infobox name module in native_name= without causing Linter stripped/missing end/misnesting errors.
if spouses parameter selected, use plural label
change tracking for plurals to only track "likely plurals" not certain ones
add logic to chose labels amongst "Thing", "Thing(s)", or "Things", depending on string supplied
rm test for net worth parameter, which has been cleaned up. rm other redundant checks for various unknown parameters, since all of them are currently fixed (amazing work!).
Undid revision 1127312088 by [[Special:Contributions/Jonesey95|Jonesey95]] ([[User talk:Jonesey95|talk]]). those weren't stray braces; restore inadvertently deleted Template:main other
swapping height and television fields to keep works together
per edit request on talk page - include entry for "signature type"
allow templates that wrap infobox person to have their own error categories and correct warning messages
remove bold from subheader, per talk
Add infobox-signature class to allow styling
clarify that "Nationality" means legal nationality, not ethnicity, and link to full explanation for readers unfamiliar with this meaning
